recommended_title: Split PR #2 into v1.0 claim-boundary slices
recommended_body: This draft PR is not mergeable as one unit. It mixes v50 auditor correctness, v52 baseline intake, v53/v54 query and generation contracts, v58 blind-eval protocol, v59 one-command replay, v61 checkpoint/runtime scaffolding, operator/review-return workflow, and README/documentation cleanup.

Split it into claim-bounded PRs so each reviewer can replay the artifacts without accepting unrelated scaffold. Merge gates are claim boundary accuracy, replayable output artifacts, and false-positive blocker closure; tests are necessary smoke evidence but are not sufficient merge conditions.
v50 artifact schema is now explicit, but auditor correctness remains blocked until the required row artifacts and sha256 manifest are present and replay-checkable without implicit public refresh.

Current v61 state: mixtral-ssd-tensor-page-read-rows, tensor dtype/quant rows, and torch-matvec-parity-rows are replay-bound, but real expert FFN forward parity, MoE block forward parity, one-token logits parity, actual generation, production latency, near-frontier quality, and release claims remain blocked until a replay artifact contains real_model_execution_ready=1. The v61 runtime policy has required_before_ssd_resident_runtime_claim_count=6, passed_before_ssd_resident_runtime_claim_count=3, blocked_before_ssd_resident_runtime_claim_count=3, present_required_artifact_count=5, and missing_required_artifact_count=5.
Ready wording must use typed readiness. Bare ready=1 does not imply real_model_execution_ready, heldout_metric_ready, human_review_ready, independent_reproduction_ready, or release_ready.

retrieval leakage remains forbidden: model/retriever input is natural-language question plus searchable corpus only; source spans, paths, lines, hashes, query/source direct bindings, expected behavior, and expected labels are evaluator-only.

D/E 30B/70B fixture rows remain schema-test evidence only until model revision, quantization, hashes, runtime, prompt/context/retrieval budgets, hardware, seed, raw answer/citation outputs, and evaluator version are accepted; required_real_evidence_field_count=11 and missing_real_evidence_field_count=11 must stay explicit in the measured-registry exclusion ledger, and model identity, raw answer/citation output, and resource/evaluator manifests must stay separate blocker rows in the acceptance ledger.

v58 response/resource intake rows and external return templates must carry latency_memory_excluded_from_quality_score=1 while A/B/C/D/E/G/H real responses require 500 rows per system; response text must not reveal model/run identity tokens, and two blinded reviewers from distinct reviewer pools, independent adjudication, unseen split, source-span exactness, and unsupported abstention remain required.

slices.scope: Roadmap, claim boundary, and release blockers.

claim_boundary.allowed: v1.0 roadmap defines source-cited, abstaining, replayable local QA/audit architecture scope.
claim_boundary.blocked: Transformer replacement, frontier local LLM, production readiness, or public comparison win.

slices.scope: v50 public-repo auditor summary/decision claim boundary, row artifact schema, sha256 manifest, and replay-artifact blocker.

claim_boundary.allowed: v50 summary/decision files record a public-repo auditor ready claim, and the contract now declares required row schemas and replay commands.
claim_boundary.blocked: Auditor correctness merge readiness remains blocked until source snapshot, audit case, source span, guard negative, commercial return, and sha256 manifest artifacts are present, schema-valid, hash-bound, and replayable; implicit public refresh is forbidden.

slices.scope: A-H baseline registry/schema contract, C 7B-14B actual adapter packet, and D/E/F intake blockers.

claim_boundary.allowed: A-H baseline registry exists; C has a local 7B-14B response packet; D/E/F blockers are explicit.
claim_boundary.blocked: C quality claim, D/E measured registry admission, 30B/70B/100B+ comparison readiness, or release readiness.

slices.scope: Pinned public repository manifest, commits, licenses, source files, and hashes.

claim_boundary.allowed: 10 public repos and complete-source manifest surface are machine-bound for PM freeze.
claim_boundary.blocked: Human-reviewed quality comparison, public benchmark claim, or v53 final readiness.

slices.scope: 1000 source-span-bound query rows with unsupported, missing, and doc-code conflict controls.

claim_boundary.allowed: 1000 complete-source queries bind to source spans with unsupported/missing/doc-code controls.
claim_boundary.blocked: Review-return completion, quality comparison, or v1.0 comparison readiness.

slices.scope: Same-query A/B/G/H internal pre-baseline rows and evaluator/resource contracts.

claim_boundary.allowed: A/B/G/H same-query measured run is an internal v1.0 pre-baseline packet.
claim_boundary.blocked: Public comparison claim, D/E replacement, or 30B/70B symmetric baseline completion.

slices.scope: Grounded RouteHint generation contract and no raw prompt stuffing guard.

claim_boundary.allowed: v54c emits 1000 grounded generation rows with answer/citation/abstain/resource/guard outputs and zero raw prompt stuffing.
claim_boundary.blocked: Human-reviewed generation quality, mainline raw prompt stuffing, or release-ready generation.

claim_boundary.allowed: v56 runner and fail-closed guard define replay requirements for source/evaluator-bound benchmark expansion.
claim_boundary.blocked: Expanded benchmark readiness, leaderboard claim, or external benchmark verification without replay artifact.

slices.scope: Blind evaluation contract, real response requirements, and human review blockers.

claim_boundary.allowed: v58 blocker ledger and intake contract define blind-response/review requirements.
claim_boundary.blocked: Blind eval completion, model superiority, or human-reviewed blind result without real response/review rows.

slices.scope: Reviewer command and PM foundation artifact bundle.

claim_boundary.allowed: v59e PM foundation one-command replay is ready without private fixtures, hidden state, network, downloads, or manual postprocessing, using pinned-source snapshot replay.
claim_boundary.blocked: Full v59 public challenge demo, public-source download/refresh readiness, v58 blind completion, h10 promotion, or v60 release readiness.

slices.scope: SSD-resident runtime R&D roadmap and one-token path blocker surface.

claim_boundary.allowed: v61 SSD-resident runtime remains an R&D roadmap/demo surface.
claim_boundary.blocked: SSD-resident real model runtime, dense local speed, near-frontier quality, production latency, or release-ready runtime claim until one-token logits parity exists.

slices.scope: Operator/review-return workflow contract across v53, v58, and v61 return/intake blockers.

claim_boundary.allowed: Operator templates, review-return intake contracts, dry-run bundles, and no-replay scaffolds define the required return surface.
claim_boundary.blocked: Accepted human review, adjudication, operator input files, real generation, production latency, near-frontier quality, or release readiness.

slices.scope: Reviewer-facing README cleanup, PR #2 title/body rewrite, and pipeline migration guidance.

claim_boundary.allowed: README and PR text point reviewers to declarative pipeline/contracts instead of giant v61 entrypoint dumps.
claim_boundary.blocked: Any README/PR wording that promotes scaffold, fixture, dry-run, operator, or runtime-admission evidence into real model generation, production, comparison, or release claims.

verification_commands: bash -c '! rg -n "test_v61hv|test_v61ea|test_v61j_one_command|Current v61 prototype smoke|현재 v61 prototype smoke" README.md README.ko.md'
